headline: Monday, day 191 — this is the PT morning every brief since Jul 13 has aimed at: the IRS lines open at 8 AM and the EIN stops being waited on. Fable died last night, so P6/P7 are either locked or they move to Opus today — one answer unblocks Batch 3. Batch 1 has now sat postable for 8 days with the whole outreach machine behind it.
source: index.html · v15.3 Signal DATA block (Jul 20 AM sweep) + PM deltas (Fable lapsed · v15.3 pushed)

spotlight.title: IRS EIN — the tap fires this morning, 8 AM PT
spotlight.detail: 22 days of silence since the Jun 28 re-fax; the '~8 business day' window closed Jul 11. The EIN is now called for, not waited on. Two moves in the same sitting: dial 1-202-488-3100 the moment lines open (ride the auto-disconnects — Chitraksh can take an 8–11 AM PT rotation from IST) and check RedFax 510-497-1224 for a reply that landed silently. This is the last gate under the whole insurance entity.

spotlight.title: Fable is gone — did P6 + P7 get locked, or do they move to Opus?
spotlight.detail: Access lapsed last night. Every brief for a week pointed at Sunday as the deadline; today is the morning after, and nobody knows the outcome. One line back to Chitraksh settles it: if the founder-ad (P6) and insurance (P7) scripts are finished, Batch 3 starts generating today. If they aren't, redraft them through Claude Opus on the shared hanfluxai@gmail.com account — same day, no tool gap.

spotlight.title: Post Batch 1 — 8 days postable, gating every outreach sequence
spotlight.detail: The pages stopped being the excuse on Jul 19: Hanflux AI and Oraya AI are both filled out. Batch 1's 6–7 reels have been declared ready since Jul 12 and nothing has gone up. Until real content is posted, PhantomBuster cannot launch a single connect request — '+430% search appearances' keeps landing on an empty feed. Select mutually, post to personal + company pages, and the gate opens today.

blockers.label: IRS EIN — 22 days silent, call window opens 8 AM PT
blockers.detail: Re-faxed Jun 28, window closed Jul 11, zero signal either way. Unblock: 1-202-488-3100 live-agent call (retry through auto-disconnects) + RedFax 510-497-1224 check. Monday is the first open line since Friday.

blockers.label: Fable EXPIRED — P6/P7 script status unknown
blockers.detail: Tool lapsed Sun Jul 19. Batch 3 (12–13 reels) cannot start until the founder-ad + insurance scripts exist. Unblock: confirm they were locked before expiry — if not, redraft via Claude Opus on the shared account today.

blockers.label: Autoloop frozen — day 24 at cycle 10
blockers.detail: The 09:00 IST launchd run has retried and failed daily for 24 days. 2-minute unblock: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner. Flip it and tomorrow's 09:00 run executes cycle 11 unattended.

tasks.lead: IRS EIN call — 8 AM PT, first open line since Friday
tasks.detail: 1-202-488-3100. Expect auto-disconnects; keep redialing until a live agent picks up. Also check RedFax 510-497-1224 — a reply may have landed with no email notice. 22 days of silence since the Jun 28 re-fax; the '~8 business day' window closed Jul 11, so this is a chase, not a wait.

tasks.lead: Mercedes receipts reply — 10 days overdue, Monday inbox
tasks.detail: Their reply has sat since Jul 10 and we owe the next move. Build it on timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot's multi-day delay → pitch voice AI + automation → book a live call where the agent demos itself. Monday morning is when their inbox actually gets read; week three starts tomorrow.

tasks.lead: Answer the Fable question in one line
tasks.detail: Did P6 (founder-ad outline) and P7 (insurance brief) get through Fable before it lapsed last night? Yes → send the finished scripts to Chitraksh and Batch 3 generates today. No → paste both prompts into Claude Opus on the shared hanfluxai@gmail.com account and finish them this morning. Either way, Batch 3 stops waiting today.

6–7 reels, ready since Jul 12. Mutually pick, then post to personal + company pages (Hanflux AI + Oraya AI, both now filled out). This is the keystone — every PhantomBuster connect and page-invite sequence sits behind it.

tasks.lead: Jharkhand: scan the network for a US investor
tasks.detail: Father's direct access to CM Hemant Soren is the moat — an investor gets the deal plus the optics. Precedent: Chinese interest at $50–100M for one data center; even $10–20M buys 'the best deal in the entire country.' Your artifact is done; Chitraksh builds the landing page + brochure around it.

tasks.lead: Full Disk Access toggle — 2 minutes, 24 days frozen
tasks.detail: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner. The autoloop has retried at 09:00 IST every day since Jun 28 and failed on this one permission. Flip it tonight and tomorrow's run executes cycle 11 with zero further input — guardrails.md governs the run as always.

tasks.lead: Attach the video-gen MCP + ingest P10 for Batch 3
tasks.detail: Batch 3 target is 12–13 reels: 6–7 insurance-vertical plus a revised pass of Batch 2 (consultancy voice everywhere, no blank end screens, subtitle layer off key visuals, new DMS tagline). The moment Frankie's P6/P7 answer lands, generation can start.

Both Pages have real Overview, Specialties and positioning as of Jul 19. Outstanding on both: a logo and banner for Oraya AI, and a real city in the Location field. Small, but it is the first thing a dealership GM sees when a connect request lands.

ATTOM trial key has returned 401 since Jun 27; BatchData's token authenticates but the balance is $0 (~$0.15/lookup, needs ~$20–30). Neither can be used for consumer outreach until the compliance gate clears — but both should be live so the lane is ready the day it does.

Build around Frankie's finished artifact: a single page an investor can be pointed at, with the brochure as a download. Pairs with his network scan — the page is what turns a warm intro into a real conversation.

tasks.lead: Cleared the stranded v15.3 dashboard push — commit d0d8139
tasks.detail: This morning's AM sweep patched the dashboard (Jul 20 sweep card, Fable chip flipped to EXPIRED, W1/W6 notes refreshed) but could not push — the sandbox shell was down for the entire run. Shell came back for this PM run and the push went through: the live dashboard is now v15.3 and current, no Chitraksh action needed.

Gmail OAuth held in the scheduled session: 0 new in 24h, 0 watch-list hits (EIN/IRS/A2P, dealership, cancellations, opt-ins); newest mail still Jun 26. No EIN reply, no Mercedes movement, no new transcripts since May 18. Every open gate is founder-action-bound, not inbox-bound.

tasks.lead: Brief published + drafted to both inboxes
tasks.detail: PM edition rebuilt from the v15.3 Signal board (the frozen v14 auto-parse — Envision Honda / Day 138 / v12.0 dashboard — replaced across headline, spotlight and all three lanes), published to the live page, and dropped as a ready-to-send Gmail draft. n8n SCHEDULE covers the real send.

tasks.lead: Autoloop cycle 11 auto-fires the moment FDA flips
tasks.detail: Nothing else is needed from either founder — the 09:00 IST launchd job retries daily on its own. Grant Full Disk Access and the next run executes cycle 11 under guardrails.md.

tasks.lead: Compliance gate holds — no consumer outreach
tasks.detail: All 7 items still open (CA + TX data-broker registration, TX SB 140, TCPA counsel red-team, privacy/Do-Not-Sell page, CCPA assessment, CA producer license line). The voice stack (Outbound v128 + Inbound v15 + Maya post-call) stays live and idle; Oraya's own B2B marketing lane is separate and unaffected.

done.what: Inbox scan LIVE (Gmail OAuth worked in scheduled session): 0 new in 24h, 0 watch-list hits (EIN/IRS/A2P, dealership, cancellations, opt-ins) — 8th straight quiet sweep, newest mail still Jun 26.
Transcript check: 0 new since May 18 (workspace + email attachments) — board ingest skipped. 0 drafts needed.

Dashboard v15.3 patched (am-sweep-2026-07-20 card, Fable chip → EXPIRED, W1/W6 notes refreshed, meta bumped). Push was BLOCKED in the AM run by a sandbox shell outage — RESOLVED in this PM run: pushed as commit d0d8139, live dashboard now current.
Fable access confirmed lapsed Jul 19 — tools chip flipped to EXPIRED and Waiting W6 rewritten from 'run it through Fable' to 'confirm scripts locked, else fall back to Opus'.
Memory updated: v15 sweep-runbook integration marked resolved; sandbox bash-outage gotcha logged for future sessions.
